---
name: Feature request
about: Something Vela should do
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What you want**
Describe the feature. If Google Maps or Organic Maps has it, name it; that's the
fastest way to communicate the target.

**Why it matters**
The situation where you missed it.

**Keyless reality check (optional)**
Vela has no backend and no API keys, so features needing Google account data or a
paid API usually can't happen. If you already know the open data source that would
power this, mention it.
